content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible curving rightward, and the car appears well-positioned near the center following the curve.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 25, target index = (25+5) % 121 = 30
- Target WP30: x=7.2304, y=1.4172
- Car: x=6.6980, y=0.7957, heading=16.130°
- dy = 1.4172 - 0.7957 = 0.6215, dx = 7.2304 - 6.6980 = 0.5324
- bearing = atan2(0.6215, 0.5324) = 49.38°
- delta = 49.38 - 16.130 = +33.25° → left (positive = steer left)

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3804m, distance_from_center = 0.00243m
- is_left_of_center = false (slightly right of center)
- edge_distance (right) = 0.3804 - 0.00243 = 0.3780m → well clear

Delta ~+33.25° → |delta| 30-50°, speed=1.0-1.5, steering_angle=15-20. Use steering_angle=15 at speed=1.5 (delta near lower bound).

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, WP30 bearing gives delta ~+33.3° (left), maintaining steering_angle=15 at speed=1.5 to follow the curve while well-centered.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving right around x=6.3-7.3.",
    "Big right curve begins around WP22-30 (x~6.3-7.2, y increases from 0.7 to 1.4).",
    "After the right curve, track loops back along y≈2.77 heading left.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Car heading ~16° (nearly due east), well-centered on track.",
    "Right curve ahead requires progressive left steering (positive delta) to follow waypoints.",
    "Steering_angle=15 at speed=1.5 is appropriate for delta ~30-35°.",
    "No objects on track detected, boundary well clear on both sides."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [6.4162, 6.5293, 6.6131, 6.6980],
    "y": [0.6890, 0.7205, 0.7527, 0.7957],
    "heading": [2.450, 7.069, 11.232, 16.130]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP30 at (7.230, 1.417): bearing=49.38°, delta=+33.25° → moderate-left steer.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
